name: White Bean Relish
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Italian plum tomatoes; peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. When the oil is hot enough to render fat from the sausage, add the diced Andouille sausage and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add the green onions, celery, shallots, and garlic to the pan. Cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
4. Stir in the cooked white navy beans and chopped Italian plum tomatoes.
5. Season with Essence, salt, and pepper.
6. Reduce heat to low and stir gently for another minute.
7. Remove from heat and spoon the sauce onto a serving platter.
8. Mound the relish in the center of the sauce.
9. Arrange prawns around the relish.
10. Garnish with fried spinach, cheese, and peppers.
Source: Essence of Emeril, #EE2333, TVFN
Formatted by Lisa Crawford, 5/27/96
